zh.lifeSummary: 當Rhys Foel ap Rhys Goch於1242年出生在威爾士時，他的父親Rhys Gôch ap Richard43歲，母親Gwenllian verch Cynarth53歲。他與Llian verch Cynhaethwy在英國威爾斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1365年在他的家鄉享年124歲，埋葬在威爾士。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rhys Foel ap Rhys Goch于1242年出生在威尔士时，他的父亲Rhys Gôch ap Richard43岁，母亲Gwenllian verch Cynarth53岁。他与Llian verch Cynhaethwy在英国威尔斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1365年在他的家乡享年124岁，埋葬在威尔士。

nameMeanings.name: Rhys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name meaning ‘ardour’; borne in the Middle Ages by various rulers in south-west Wales, including  Rhys ap Tewdur  (  d. 1093 ) and  Rhys ap Gruffudd  (  1132–97 ).

variants.name: Reece
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Rhys . The name is now in widespread and frequent use outside Wales, in many cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the given name.

variants.name: Rees
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Welsh Rhys, in some cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the Welsh given name.

nameMeanings.name: Foel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, composed of two different Hebrew elements, Yah(weh) and El, both of which mean ‘God’ the implication of the name is that the Hebrew God, Yahweh, is the only true god. This is a common name in the Bible, being borne by, among others, one of King David's ‘mighty men’ (1 Chronicles 11:38), and a minor prophet who lived in the 8th century bc . The name has been perennially popular as a Jewish name; it was also taken up by the Puritans and other Christian fundamentalists. The name has long been in regular use in North America but was uncommon in Britain until the 1990s. Well-known bearers of the name include the American singer and entertainer Joel Grey ( b. 1932 ), the West Indian cricketer Joel Garner ( b. 1952 ), and the American film director Joel Coen ( b. 1954 ). The French form Joël is also used in the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

nameMeanings.name: Rhys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name meaning ‘ardour’; borne in the Middle Ages by various rulers in south-west Wales, including  Rhys ap Tewdur  (  d. 1093 ) and  Rhys ap Gruffudd  (  1132–97 ).

variants.name: Reece
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Rhys . The name is now in widespread and frequent use outside Wales, in many cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the given name.

variants.name: Rees
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Welsh Rhys, in some cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the Welsh given name.

nameMeanings.name: Goch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Rhys Foel ap Rhys Goch was born in 1242, in Wales, his father, Rhys Gôch ap Richard, was 43 and his mother, Gwenllian verch Cynarth, was 53. He married Llian verch Cynhaethwy in Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died about 1365, in his hometown, at the age of 124, and was buried in Wales.

fr.Cadoxton, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingd: Cadoxton, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.of Garthgarmon, Llanrwst, Denbighshire,: Llanrwst, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rhys Foel ap Rhys Goch est né en 1242, à Galles, son père, Rhys Gôch ap Richard, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian verch Cynarth, avait 53 ans. Il a épousé Llian verch Cynhaethwy à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1365, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 124 ans, et a été enterré à Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rhys Foel ap Rhys Goch 1242 in Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rhys Gôch ap Richard 43 und seine Mutter Gwenllian verch Cynarth 53. Er hat in Wales, United Kingdom Llian verch Cynhaethwy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1365 im Alter von 124 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rhys Foel ap Rhys Goch è nato il nel 1242 nel Galles, il suo padre, Rhys Gôch ap Richard, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Gwenllian verch Cynarth, aveva 53 anni. Lui sposato Llian verch Cynhaethwy nel Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1365, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 124 anni, e fu sepolto a Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Rhys Foel ap Rhys Gochが1242年にウェールズで生まれた時，父Rhys Gôch ap Richardは43歳，母Gwenllian verch Cynarthは53歳であった。イギリスウェールズでLlian verch Cynhaethwyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1365年に故郷で124歳で死去し，ウェールズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rhys Foel ap Rhys Goch(이)가 1242년 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rhys Gôch ap Richard(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwenllian verch Cynarth(은)는 53세였다. 그는 영국 웨일스에서 Llian verch Cynhaethwy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1365년 그의 고향에서 124세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rhys Foel ap Rhys Goch nasceu em 1242, em Gales, seu pai, Rhys Gôch ap Richard, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian verch Cynarth, tinha 53 anos. Ele casou-se com Llian verch Cynhaethwy em Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1365, em sua cidade natal, com 124 anos, e foi sepultado em Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rhys Foel ap Rhys Goch родился в 1242 г. в местности Уэльс, его отцу по имени Rhys Gôch ap Richard было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian verch Cynarth, 53. Он женился на женщине по имени Llian verch Cynhaethwy в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1365 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 124 лет и был похоронен в местности Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rhys Foel ap Rhys Goch nació en 1242, en Gales, su papá, Rhys Gôch ap Richard, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Gwenllian verch Cynarth, tenía 53 años. Se casó con Llian verch Cynhaethwy en Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1365, en su pueblo, a la edad de 124 años, y fue sepultado en Gales.
